name: Carrot Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the carrots in stock until tender.
2. Drain and mash the carrots, reserving the liquid.
3. Saute the onions and bell pepper in butter until tender.
4. Add flour, stirring until smooth.
5. Gradually add milk; cook, stirring constantly, until slightly thickened.
6. Mix enough water with the carrot liquid to make 2 cups total.
7. Combine the liquids, milk mixture, carrots, cheese, and spices.
8. Stir continuously over moderate heat until the soup is well heated and the cheese is melted.
9. Garnish with parsley if desired.
